findings.description: PascalCase class names `JaxRsResponseHandler` and `WebFrontController` appear in the XML configuration example within s4's content but are absent from s4's hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source XML config in 'CORSを実現する' section: `<component class="nablarch.fw.jaxrs.JaxRsResponseHandler">` and `<component name="webFrontController" class="nablarch.fw.web.servlet.WebFrontController">`
